x_ramza_comment: ECL v2.0 envelope sidecar. See ../ECL_VERSION for the targeted ECL version and the canonical spec at Rynaro/eidolons-ecl (spec/ecl-2.0.md). Validate this file against ../schemas/ecl-envelope.v2.json (ecl-envelope.v1.json is retained for the §7.3 back-compat window). Fill every <placeholder> before emitting, then run `ramza-verify-emit --spec <spec> --envelope <this-file>` as the final Assemble exit gate.
objective: <One sentence ≤240 chars stating what this spec proposes, e.g. 'Propose implementation spec for <feature> targeting <repo>.'>

artifact.sha256: <64-hex-chars lowercase sha256 of the spec Markdown file bytes>

context_delta.summary: <One-paragraph summary of what this spec contains and what APIVR-Δ should act on.>

x_ramza_acceptance_criteria.x_ramza_comment: Stub — populate at Assemble with the `ramza-freeze --state <state> --criteria <file>` output. Present whenever this spec emits EARS-form acceptance criteria per templates/acceptance-criteria.md (the normal case); omit this whole object only for a spec that carries no lintable acceptance-criteria block at all.
x_ramza_acceptance_criteria.sha256: <64-hex-chars lowercase sha256 — the value ramza-freeze printed, frozen per templates/acceptance-criteria.md>
